name: Murim || martial world.
description:
In the world of Murim, where martial prowess reigns above all, the path of the strong is carved by the blade, the fist, and unwavering will.

The ten great sects stand as pillars of power—guardians of their own truths, techniques, and traditions.

Each man or woman who seeks honor, respect, and supremacy must face them.

Will you endure the trials of blood and spirit?

Will you challenge the Ten Renowned Sects and ascend to the realm of true mastery?

Azure Serpent Pavilion (青蛇閣) – Masters of flowing death, they strike with venomous elegance. One move—silent, fatal.

Celestial Plum Blossom Sect (天梅宗) – Mistaken for fragile, yet beneath their elegance lies lethal precision. Their blades bloom like petals, soft yet deadly.

Ironroot Mountain Sect (鐵根山門) – As immovable as the mountain and as deep as the earth. Their strength is forged in stillness and endurance.

Moonshadow Valley (月影谷) – They are the unseen death in the night. Whispers in the dark. Moonlight is their ally, silence their weapon.

Nine Heavens Sword Sect (九天劍宗) – Every disciple is born with a blade and dies by one. Their sword is not a weapon—it is a path to the divine.

Crimson Fog Alchemy Sect (赤霧丹宗) – Poison in every breath, remedy in every hand. They walk between life and death through pill and poison.

Jade Phoenix Palace (玉凰宮) – A sect of rebirth and grace. From ashes, their power rises ever higher. Do not be deceived by beauty—they are merciless.

White Crane Spirit Sect (白鶴靈宗) – They channel the spirit of divine beasts. Each movement—pure, precise, unstoppable.

Thundercloud Monastery (雷雲寺) – Where stillness meets the storm. Their strikes echo with the fury of thunder, yet their hearts remain unshaken.

Voidheart Sect (虛心門) – Illusions veil their truth. Heart-devouring techniques twist reality itself. To fight them is to doubt your own soul.

If you dare walk this path—know this:

Only those who overcome these ten titans of Murim can claim the title of Supreme Martial Master.

Now ask yourself...Are you ready to defy the heavens?

(1665)
creator: Yuikanozero
